ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "wine_type" TEXT /* Type of wine (e.g., white, red, rosé) */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production batch */,
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vineyard where the grapes were harvested */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year of grape harvest */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of wine production */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score assigned to the wine sample */,
  "grape_variety" TEXT /* Type of grape used in the wine */,
  "production_method" TEXT /* Method of production (e.g., traditional, modern) */,
  "bottling_location" TEXT /* Location where the wine was bottled */,
  "aging_period" INTEGER /* Aging period of the wine (in months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_vineyard_id FOREIGN KEY ("vineyard_id") REFERENCES vineyards ("vineyard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the production batch */,
  "production_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production facility */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the batch production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the batch production */,
  "bottling_date" TEXT /* Date of bottling */,
  "grape_variety" TEXT /* Type of grape used in the batch */,
  "production_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of wine produced in the batch (in liters) */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the production process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_production_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_facility_id") REFERENCES production_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vineyards" (
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vineyard */,
  "vineyard_name" TEXT /* Name of the vineyard */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vineyard */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vineyard */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the vineyard */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate conditions of the vineyard */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the vineyard (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vineyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the production facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., winery, distillery) */,
  "production_capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the facility (in liters per year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical analysis record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity level of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity level of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid level of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides content of the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates content of the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_analysis_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensory_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensory evaluation record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "appearance_score" INTEGER /* Score for the appearance of the wine */,
  "aroma_score" INTEGER /* Score for the aroma of the wine */,
  "taste_score" INTEGER /* Score for the taste of the wine */,
  "finish_score" INTEGER /* Score for the finish of the wine */,
  "overall_score" INTEGER /* Overall sensory score */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the sensory evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the evaluators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_evaluation_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_evaluation_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., sommelier, enologist) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in sensory evaluation */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality control inspection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the inspection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the inspection */,
  "light_exposure" TEXT /* Light exposure during the inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspector */,
  "inspection_method" TEXT /* Method used for inspection */,
  "inspection_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the inspection (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level (e.g., Certified Inspector, Senior Inspector) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in quality control */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality control analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., production, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production batch */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of wine bottles in the batch */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the batch */,
  "distribution_channel" TEXT /* Distribution channel (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the wine batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production batch */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the distribution */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of wine bottles distributed */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of distribution */,
  "transport_method" TEXT /* Transport method used (e.g., truck, train) */,
  "transport_company" TEXT /* Transport company used for the distribution */,
  "transport_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)
